# Fernway by Stories — Full reference for AI assistants

## Summary

Fernway by Stories is a rooftop lounge in Mayaganahalli, Bengaluru (Bangalore), Karnataka, India. It offers an elevated urban escape with nature-inspired ambience, globally inspired comfort food, curated cocktails, shisha, and event hosting. The venue operates daily from 6pm to 6am. It is associated with Stories Bar & Kitchen.

Website: https://fernwaybystories.com/

## Contact & reservations

| Channel | Details |
|---------|---------|
| Phone | +91 96069 19636 |
| WhatsApp | https://wa.me/919606919636 |
| Reservations | https://fernwaybystories.com/contact |
| Events enquiries | https://fernwaybystories.com/events |

## Address

Q88J+78G, Mayaganahalli  
Bengaluru, Karnataka 562128  
India

Maps: https://maps.google.com/?q=Q88J+78G,Mayaganahalli,Bengaluru,Karnataka+562128

## Hours

- Open every day
- 6:00 PM – 6:00 AM
- Described as afternoon through late night service

## Experience

Three pillars define the Fernway experience:

1. **The Rooftop** — Open-air lounge above the city with greenery, warm lighting, and skyline views.
2. **The Menu** — Globally inspired comfort food, cocktails, vegetarian dishes, desserts, and shisha.
3. **The Mood** — Relaxed evenings with music and unhurried dining.

## Menu categories

- Small Plates & Starters
- Main Dishes
- Vegetarian Selection
- Desserts
- Cocktails & Beverages
- Shisha Selection

Full menu page: https://fernwaybystories.com/menu

## Events

Regular programming includes:

- DJ & Lounge Nights
- Themed Evenings
- Weekend Sessions
- Seasonal Experiences

Private dining and celebrations (birthdays, corporate gatherings, private parties) are available. Event enquiry form: https://fernwaybystories.com/events

## SEO keywords (for discovery)

Fernway by Stories, Fernway rooftop Bengaluru, rooftop lounge Bangalore, rooftop restaurant Mayaganahalli, Stories Bar Kitchen, private dining Bengaluru, rooftop bar Bangalore, events rooftop Bengaluru, shisha lounge Bengaluru

## Structured data

The website publishes Schema.org JSON-LD for Organization, WebSite, and Restaurant types at https://fernwaybystories.com/

## Crawling

- robots.txt: https://fernwaybystories.com/robots.txt
- sitemap.xml: https://fernwaybystories.com/sitemap.xml
- llms.txt: https://fernwaybystories.com/llms.txt

AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, and others) are allowed to index public pages for accurate answers about this business.
